summary: Tested 4 bug fixes in Édu-Connect platform. Bug #4 (inscription service selection) CONFIRMED FIXED. Bugs #1, #2, #3 could not be fully tested due to authentication issues, but code review shows fixes are implemented.

critical_bugs.impact: Prevents testing of authenticated features (dashboard, viability, chat, GED)

working_endpoints.description: Returns 8 Direction Générales for inscription step 2

authentication_issues.issue: Login attempts fail with 401 for all known test credentials
authentication_issues.impact: Cannot access protected features to test bugs #1, #2, #3

passed_tests: Services dropdown cascade API returns proper data
Protected pages correctly redirect to login
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication system - all test credentials return 401 Unauthorized. Need valid credentials to test bugs #1 (GED Zone Verte), #2 (Viability pie chart), and #3 (Chat user search). Alternatively, provide working test credentials or create demo users that can be used for testing.

success_percentage.backend: 25% (1/4 bugs fully testable due to auth issues)
success_percentage.frontend: 25% (1/4 bugs fully testable due to auth issues)

bug_1_ged_zone_verte.code_review: ContexteSwitcher.jsx has improved error handling for basculement contexte
bug_1_ged_zone_verte.expected_fix: Better error handling when switching between Zone Bleue/Verte

bug_2_viability_pie_chart.reason: Authentication required to access viability page
bug_2_viability_pie_chart.code_review: EvaluationViabilite.jsx has pie chart with equal portions fallback data
bug_2_viability_pie_chart.expected_fix: Pie chart shows 5 viability levels with equal portions when no data

bug_3_chat_user_search.reason: Authentication required to access chat page
bug_3_chat_user_search.code_review: ChatGED.jsx has user search with filteredUsers, routes_chat.py returns all users
bug_3_chat_user_search.expected_fix: User search returns results without hierarchical filtering

details: Inscription step 1 form fills and submits successfully
8 Direction Générales displayed in service grid
No authentication required for inscription flow

recommendations: Create working demo users or fix existing test credentials
Verify user seeding process is working correctly
Check if password hashing is consistent between seeded users and login process
Consider adding a public demo mode for testing authenticated features
